Imports

bitstreams, entropy, types

Types

AttributeCornerTable = object
  edgeOnSeam*: seq[uint8]
  vertexOnSeam*: seq[uint8]
  cornerToVertex*: seq[int]
  vertexLeftmost*: seq[int]
  vertexParents*: seq[int]
  effectiveOpposites*: seq[int]
Source   Edit   
AttributeData = object
  decoderId*: int
  connectivity*: AttributeCornerTable
  connectivityUsed*: bool
  encoding*: EncodingData
  seamCorners*: seq[int]
Source   Edit   
CornerTable = object
  faceCount*: int
  cornerToVertex*: seq[int]
  opposites*: seq[int]
  vertexCorners*: seq[int]
  vertexCount*: int
Source   Edit   
EdgebreakerMesh = object
  mesh*: DracoMesh
  cornerTable*: CornerTable
  attributeData*: seq[AttributeData]
  posEncoding*: EncodingData
  posDataDecoderId*: int
Source   Edit   
EncodingData = object
  vertexToValue*: seq[int]
  valueToCorner*: seq[int]
  valueCount*: int
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc applyPointMap(attr: var DracoAttribute; conn: AttributeCornerTable;
                   mesh: DracoMesh; data: EncodingData) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Builds a final point map for seam-split attributes. Source   Edit   
proc applyPointMap(attr: var DracoAttribute; table: CornerTable;
                   mesh: DracoMesh; data: EncodingData) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Builds the final point-to-attribute-value map. Source   Edit   
proc cornerCount(table: CornerTable): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the number of corners in the table. Source   Edit   
proc decodeEdgebreakerMesh(stream: var DracoStream; traversalKind: int): EdgebreakerMesh {.
    ...raises: [DracoError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decodes Draco edgebreaker mesh connectivity. Source   Edit   
proc decodeSequentialMesh(stream: var DracoStream): DracoMesh {.
    ...raises: [DracoError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decodes Draco sequential mesh connectivity. Source   Edit   
proc face(corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the triangle id for a corner. Source   Edit   
proc generateSequence(attr: AttributeCornerTable; base: CornerTable;
                      mesh: DracoMesh; data: var EncodingData): seq[int] {.
    ...raises: [DracoError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generates attribute traversal point ids for seam connectivity. Source   Edit   
proc generateSequence(table: CornerTable; mesh: DracoMesh;
                      data: var EncodingData): seq[int] {....raises: [DracoError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generates mesh traversal point ids for attribute decoding. Source   Edit   
proc generateSequence(table: CornerTable; mesh: DracoMesh;
                      data: var EncodingData; traversalMethod: int): seq[int] {.
    ...raises: [DracoError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generates mesh traversal point ids for attribute decoding. Source   Edit   
proc leftMostCorner(table: CornerTable; vertex: int): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns a representative corner for a vertex. Source   Edit   
proc nextCorner(corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the next corner on the same triangle. Source   Edit   
proc opposite(table: CornerTable; corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the opposite corner across an edge. Source   Edit   
proc previousCorner(corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the previous corner on the same triangle. Source   Edit   
proc swingLeft(table: CornerTable; corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Moves counter-clockwise around a vertex. Source   Edit   
proc swingRight(table: CornerTable; corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Moves clockwise around a vertex. Source   Edit   
proc vertex(table: CornerTable; corner: int): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the vertex mapped to a corner. Source   Edit
